title: Crystal Chronicles
description: Addon for Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks - expanding the schools of magic with unique armors, weapons and biomes.
body:
![banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Crystal_Chronicles/BH_Crystal_Chronicles_header.webp) ![desc](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Crystal_Chronicles/BH_Crystal_Chronicles_description.webp)   This mod is an exciting addon for Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, introducing a whole new dimension and enhancing the magical gameplay experience. Dive into the Magical Cave Dimension, a sprawling underground world inspired by the schools of magic. # 📜Features:   ## 3D Armors & Weapons: Unlock improved versions of the armors and weapons from Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks. These 3D models are visually enhanced and come with better stats, including increased mana and spell power, making them more effective in combat and exploration.   # WIP: ## Magical Cave Dimension: Enter a vast underground cave dimension, divided into biomes that represent each school of magic. These biomes are carefully designed with themed blocks, creating a distinct atmosphere for every school. They also serve as key areas for gathering rare resources needed for progression. ## Crystal Gathering & Upgrades: Each school of magic has a unique crystal hidden within its biome. These crystals provide boosts to mana and spell power for their respective magic school when used to upgrade armor and weapons from Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks. Crystals are extremely rare and difficult to obtain. They come with self-defense mechanisms, using attacks to protect themselves from players. This adds an additional layer of challenge to farming these valuable resources. ## Biome-Specific Mobs: Every biome is inhabited by unique mobs tailored to its school of magic. These mobs align with the biome’s theme and provide a challenging experience. They also drop biome-specific resources that are crucial for crafting and upgrades.   Join Our Community Discord! Check out [PixelDreamStudios](https://discord.gg/4A9SEahH4U) - an official partner! Join my Personal Discord - [CLICK HERE](https://discord.vpixel.studio/) ![instal](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Crystal_Chronicles/BH_Crystal_Chronicles_installation.webp) # 📦 Required - [Azurelib](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib) - [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) # 📦 Highly recommended - using JEI or REI to see the recipes! - using Better Combat - using Combat Roll   Note: This mod is not compatible with Optifine! Alternative: [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) + [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)! ![faq](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Crystal_Chronicles/BH_Crystal_Chronicles_faq.webp)

Work in Progress!
